name: First Steps
description: Complete your very first training exercise. Every journey starts with a single sit!
buddy_message: You did it! Your first exercise is done and {dog_name}'s training journey has officially begun! This is going to be amazing.
share_text: {dog_name} just completed their first training exercise with PupPal! 🐾

name: Sit Happens
description: Master the 'Sit' command — complete all sit exercises with a 4+ average rating.
buddy_message: Sit Happens — and {dog_name} NAILED it! That's a rock-solid sit. You two are a great team.
share_text: {dog_name} has mastered 'Sit'! 🎯 #PupPalTrained

name: Down to Earth
description: Master the 'Down' command — complete all down exercises with a 4+ average rating.
buddy_message: Down to Earth! {dog_name} has officially mastered 'Down.' That's a big deal — it's one of the hardest basics to teach.
share_text: {dog_name} has mastered 'Down'! Getting better every day 💪 #PupPalTrained

name: Come Here!
description: Master 'Come/Recall' — the most important safety command your dog will ever learn.
buddy_message: Come Here! {dog_name} is coming when called — that's not just an achievement, it's a potential lifesaver. Seriously impressive.
share_text: {dog_name} has mastered Recall! The most important command nailed ✅ #PupPalTrained

name: Stay Gold
description: Master 'Stay' with both duration and distance — patience is a superpower.
buddy_message: Stay Gold, {dog_name}! Mastering 'Stay' takes real patience — from BOTH of you. That's a mark of a well-trained team.
share_text: {dog_name} has mastered 'Stay'! Patience pays off 🌟 #PupPalTrained

name: Leave It Legend
description: Master 'Leave It' — your dog can resist temptation like a champion.
buddy_message: Leave It Legend! {dog_name} can resist temptation now. Do you know how many socks you just saved? Countless.
share_text: {dog_name} has mastered 'Leave It'! No more stolen socks 🧦 #PupPalTrained

name: Potty Pro
description: Complete all potty training exercises. Accidents are officially a thing of the past!
buddy_message: Potty Pro! {dog_name} has graduated from potty training! Your carpets are safe. This is a HUGE milestone.
share_text: {dog_name} is officially potty trained! 🎉🏠 #PottyPro #PupPalTrained

name: Gentle Mouth
description: Complete the bite inhibition programme. Those shark teeth are under control!
buddy_message: Gentle Mouth achieved! {dog_name}'s land shark phase is officially over. Your hands and ankles thank you.
share_text: {dog_name} has graduated from the land shark phase! Gentle mouth achieved 🦷 #PupPalTrained

name: Leash Boss
description: Complete the leash skills programme. Walks just got a whole lot more enjoyable.
buddy_message: Leash Boss! {dog_name} walks like a dream now. No more arm-wrestling on every walk. You two look great out there!
share_text: {dog_name} is a Leash Boss! Walks are a joy now 🐕‍🦺 #PupPalTrained

name: Crate Escape
description: Complete the crate training programme. The crate is now a happy place!
buddy_message: Crate Escape! Ironic name, because {dog_name} actually LIKES the crate now. That's the goal — a happy, safe space.
share_text: {dog_name} loves their crate now! Crate training complete 🏠 #PupPalTrained

name: Social Butterfly
description: Complete the socialisation programme. Your pup is confident and friendly with the world!

share_text: {dog_name} is a Social Butterfly! Confident and friendly everywhere 🦋 #PupPalTrained

name: Real World Ready
description: Complete all real-world exercises. Your pup can handle cafés, vets, and beyond!

share_text: {dog_name} is Real World Ready! From vet visits to café vibes 🌍 #PupPalTrained

name: Good Boy Graduate
description: Complete the full 12-week training plan. This is the big one!

share_text: 🎓 {dog_name} just GRADUATED from PupPal's 12-week training plan! So proud! #GoodBoyGraduate #PupPalTrained

name: Getting Started
description: Train 3 days in a row. Consistency is the secret to great training!
buddy_message: 3 days in a row! Getting Started — you're building a habit! {dog_name} can feel the consistency already.
share_text: 3-day training streak with {dog_name}! Just getting started 🔥 #PupPalStreak

description: Maintain a 7-day training streak. A full week of dedication!

share_text: 7-day training streak! One Week Wonder 🔥 {dog_name} and I are on a roll! #PupPalStreak

name: Two Week Warrior
description: 14 days of consecutive training. You're building a real habit now!

name: Legend
